name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project

labels: ['enhancement', 'needs-discussion']
assignees: ''

---

## ✨ Feature Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see added. -->

## 🎯 Problem Statement
<!-- What problem does this feature solve? What pain point does it address? -->

## 💡 Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe your proposed solution in detail. -->

## 🌍 Use Cases
<!-- Describe specific use cases where this feature would be valuable. -->
1. **User Scenario**: <!-- Describe a specific user scenario -->
2. **Business Impact**: <!-- How does this help the business/social mission? -->
3. **Frequency**: <!-- How often would users use this feature? -->

## 🎨 Design Considerations
<!-- Any UI/UX considerations for this feature. -->
- **User Interface**: <!-- Describe the UI changes needed -->
- **User Experience**: <!-- How would this improve the user experience? -->
- **Accessibility**: <!-- Any accessibility considerations -->

## 🌐 Language Support
<!-- How should this feature support Hindi and English? -->
- **Hindi**: <!-- Hindi-specific considerations -->
- **English**: <!-- English-specific considerations -->
- **Both**: <!-- Implementation for both languages -->

## 🔧 Technical Implementation
<!-- Any technical considerations or implementation details. -->
- **Backend Changes**: <!-- Required backend changes -->
- **Frontend Changes**: <!-- Required frontend changes -->
- **Database Changes**: <!-- Database schema changes if any -->
- **API Changes**: <!-- API endpoint changes if any -->
- **Dependencies**: <!-- New dependencies required -->

## 📱 Mobile Considerations
<!-- How should this work on mobile devices? -->
- **Responsive Design**: <!-- Mobile-specific considerations -->
- **Touch Interactions**: <!-- Touch interface considerations -->
- **Performance**: <!-- Performance implications on mobile -->

## 🔒 Security & Privacy
<!-- Any security or privacy considerations. -->
- **Data Protection**: <!-- User data protection considerations -->
- **Privacy**: <!-- Privacy implications -->
- **Authentication**: <!-- Authentication requirements -->

## 📊 Success Metrics
<!-- How would we measure the success of this feature? -->
- **User Engagement**: <!-- Metrics to track user engagement -->
- **Adoption Rate**: <!-- How to measure feature adoption -->
- **Performance**: <!-- Performance metrics to track -->

## 🚀 Implementation Priority
<!-- What priority should this feature have? -->
- **Priority**: Low/Medium/High/Critical
- **Timeline**: <!-- Suggested implementation timeline -->
- **Dependencies**: <!-- Any dependencies on other features -->

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
<!-- What alternative solutions did you consider? -->
1. **Alternative 1**: <!-- Describe alternative solution -->
2. **Alternative 2**: <!-- Describe alternative solution -->
3. **Why this approach**: <!-- Why you prefer the proposed solution -->

## 📚 Additional Resources
<!-- Any additional resources or references. -->
- **Examples**: <!-- Examples of similar features in other apps -->
- **Documentation**: <!-- Relevant documentation -->
- **Research**: <!-- Any research or user feedback -->

## 🎯 Acceptance Criteria
<!-- What would make this feature complete? -->
- [ ] **Requirement 1**: <!-- First requirement -->
- [ ] **Requirement 2**: <!-- Second requirement -->
- [ ] **Requirement 3**: <!-- Third requirement -->
- [ ] **Testing**: <!-- All tests pass -->
- [ ] **Documentation**: <!-- Documentation updated -->
- [ ] **Both Languages**: <!-- Hindi and English support implemented -->

## 🙏 Thank You!

Thank you for suggesting this feature! Your ideas help us improve SarkariSaathi and better serve our users.

**हिंदी में**: यह सुविधा सुझाने के लिए धन्यवाद! आपके विचार हमें SarkariSaathi को बेहतर बनाने और हमारे उपयोगकर्ताओं को बेहतर सेवा देने में मदद करते हैं।
